basics.description: **Abstract Security** — the Security Data Pipeline Platform. This Microsoft Sentinel solution makes Abstract-delivered data discoverable and actionable: a branded **data connector** tile, an **ASIM parser**, an **analytics rule**, two **hunting queries**, a **pipeline-overview workbook**, two **SOAR playbooks**, and a **Security Copilot** plugin + agent — all wired to the Abstract API so you can triage in Sentinel and act on the pipeline in Abstract. [Abstract Security](https://abstract.security) · [Documentation](https://docs.abstractsecurity.app)

metadata.hidden: Hiding location, we get it from the log analytics workspace

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace name
basics.toolTip: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is enabled and where the Abstract custom table (AbstractEventLogs_CL) lives.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter the existing workspace name (4-63 chars).

options.text: Installs the 'Abstract - High or Critical event' scheduled analytics rule (which surfaces AbstractInsightId for the Verdict playbook), the ASim_AbstractEvent parser, and two hunting queries (rare product, high-risk identities).
Installs the Abstract Security data connector tile (live ingestion-status graph) and the Pipeline Overview workbook (volume, coverage, and a reduction/cost estimate).

The Logic App playbooks (Enrich Incident, Verdict) and the Security Copilot plugin/agent ship in the solution source (solution/playbooks, solution/copilot) and deploy separately so you can provide the Abstract API key via Key Vault. See solution/README.md.
Never paste the Abstract API key into a template. Playbooks take it as a secure parameter or Key Vault reference; the Copilot plugin stores it as a credential setting.
